name: hex4code
description: Hex4Code — AI-powered coding assistant with multi-model routing, semantic cache, and pipeline orchestration
author: Zhengzhou Weiguang Semiconductor Co., Ltd.

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:vscode && npm run build:cli
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:vscode && npm run test:cli
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/core && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../../vscode && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../packages/cli && npx tsc --noEmit
